task_completion.description: Verify that the application's search interface is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search bar, search icon, or dedicated search screen is visible and active within the aviation application.

task_completion.description: Verify that the identifier 'KSQL' is entered into the search field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'KSQL' is clearly visible inside the search input box.

task_completion.description: Verify that San Carlos Airport (KSQL) is selected from the search results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search result indicating 'San Carlos' or 'KSQL' is tapped, highlighted, or the application has transitioned to the specific information page for this airport.

task_completion.description: Verify that the A/FD (Airport/Facility Directory) tab is selected and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab, button, or section explicitly labeled 'A/FD' is highlighted, underlined, or otherwise shown as the currently active view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Airport/Facility Directory details for KSQL, including elevation and frequencies, are displayed on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays detailed aviation facility data for San Carlos (KSQL), specifically showing numerical values and labels for elevation and communication frequencies.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the application's graphical user interface rather than using terminal commands to fetch data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show standard UI elements (keyboards, buttons, tabs being pressed) rather than a terminal window or command-line interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual aviation application (Avare) to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must clearly belong to a dedicated aviation GPS/directory app, not a web browser searching Google, a text editor, or a generic notes app.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply type the expected answer into a text field to spoof completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The A/FD information (elevation, frequencies) must be rendered as static text by the application's native UI, not as editable text inside an input field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target airport identifier is KSQL, which corresponds to San Carlos Airport. The correct tab to view is 'A/FD' (Airport/Facility Directory). A successful completion must show the A/FD tab active with facility details such as elevation and frequencies clearly visible for KSQL.
